mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, user_no, username, password_hash, display_name, user_type, dept_name, mobile_encrypted, email, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_account WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account ( tenant_id, user_no, username, password_hash, display_name, user_type, dept_name, mobile_encrypted, email, status, last_login_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{userNo}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{userType}, #{deptName}, #{mobileEncrypted}, #{email}, #{status}, #{lastLoginAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET user_no = #{userNo}, username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, display_name = #{displayName}, user_type = #{userType}, dept_name = #{deptName}, mobile_encrypted = #{mobileEncrypted}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
